location_precision.why: Every one of the five findings carries a usable file:line, e.g. "src/sync.py:14" and "src/report.py:11".

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no compound failure mode connecting two defects — e.g. the empty-users return in report.py:5 and the floor-division returning no users in sync.py:14 are never linked mechanistically.

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states a failure mechanism, e.g. "The mutable default `seen` list persists IDs across calls, causing later sync runs in the same process to silently skip users."
